summary: Operator confirmed the Research Agent manual screen-reader protocol passed. Environment fields were populated from locally queried Windows, Chrome, and Windows Narrator versions; no credential material or sensitive documents were used.

documents: non-sensitive research fixture documents already present in the local demo workspace

sr_approval_context.notes: Operator confirmed approval risk level, status, action, Approve, and Deny controls were announced with sufficient context.

sr_keyboard_primary_controls.notes: Operator confirmed Market, Execution profile, Research question, Run, Upload, and Import CSV were keyboard reachable and named.

sr_landmarks_sections.notes: Operator confirmed Input, Research Memo, Evidence, Quality, and Agent Timeline sections were discoverable by the screen reader.

sr_memo_evidence_quality_timeline.notes: Operator confirmed memo content, citations/evidence, cost/evaluation metrics, and timeline content were understandable through the screen reader.

sr_no_keyboard_trap.notes: Operator confirmed the primary Research Agent workflow had no keyboard trap, unexpected focus loss, or blocking unlabeled interactive control.

sr_status_announcements.notes: Operator confirmed run status changes were announced without relying on visual inspection.

redaction_review.notes: Operator confirmed no credential material, proprietary customer data, or sensitive documents were used or recorded.
